nodes.title: OpenSpec: epic-progress-dashboard
nodes.description: Execution tracker for openspec/changes/epic-progress-dashboard. Adds an Epic Dashboard pane that shows ready/blocked/paused task state for an imported OpenSpec change, with bd CLI + Dolt-fallback backend, TanStack Query frontend, and ChangeCard click target.

nodes.title: 1.1: Create bd_mol.rs with EpicReadySnapshot, BlockerLink, SnapshotSource types
nodes.description: openspec/changes/epic-progress-dashboard/tasks.md §1.1. Create `src-tauri/src/commands/bd_mol.rs` with structs `EpicReadySnapshot`, `BlockerLink`, and enum `SnapshotSource`. All derive `serde::Serialize`, `serde::Deserialize`, `specta::Type`.

nodes.title: 1.2: Implement get_epic_ready_snapshot command with bd CLI + Dolt fallback
nodes.description: openspec/changes/epic-progress-dashboard/tasks.md §1.2. Implement `get_epic_ready_snapshot(project_path, epic_id, registry)` that runs `bd ready --mol <epic_id> --json`, parses result, computes paused_task_ids via SQL, and falls back to Dolt-direct query on failure.

nodes.title: 1.3: Implement claim_task command in bd_mol.rs
nodes.description: openspec/changes/epic-progress-dashboard/tasks.md §1.3. Implement `claim_task(project_path, task_id)` in `bd_mol.rs` that shells out `bd update <task_id> --claim` and re-reads the issue via the existing `read_task` helper.

nodes.title: 1.4: Register get_epic_ready_snapshot and claim_task in lib.rs
nodes.description: openspec/changes/epic-progress-dashboard/tasks.md §1.4. Register both new commands in `src-tauri/src/lib.rs` `tauri::generate_handler!` and `tauri_specta::collect_commands!`.

nodes.title: 1.5: Add mod bd_mol and re-export commands in commands/mod.rs
nodes.description: openspec/changes/epic-progress-dashboard/tasks.md §1.5. Add `mod bd_mol;` to `src-tauri/src/commands/mod.rs` and re-export `get_epic_ready_snapshot`, `claim_task` alongside existing `openspec::*` exports.

nodes.title: 2.1: Unit test bd ready --mol JSON parser (fixture: ready + blocked + empty)
nodes.description: openspec/changes/epic-progress-dashboard/tasks.md §2.1. Unit test the JSON parser for `bd ready --mol --json` against a captured-fixture string covering ready + blocked + empty cases.

nodes.title: 2.2: Unit test Dolt-fallback ready-derivation against seeded temp registry
nodes.description: openspec/changes/epic-progress-dashboard/tasks.md §2.2. Unit test the Dolt-fallback ready-derivation against a seeded temp registry: epic with three children where one is blocked, one is in-progress, one is open with no deps.

nodes.title: 2.3: Unit test Paused note-prefix detection (three note variants)
nodes.description: openspec/changes/epic-progress-dashboard/tasks.md §2.3. Unit test the `Paused` note-prefix detection with three notes: `Paused: foo` → match, `Paused - bar bd-99` → match + extracts `bd-99`, `Was paused yesterday` → no match.

nodes.title: 2.4: Unit test source-fallback contract (non-zero CLI exit → SnapshotSource::Dolt)
nodes.description: openspec/changes/epic-progress-dashboard/tasks.md §2.4. Unit test the source-fallback contract: when the CLI subprocess returns non-zero, `source == SnapshotSource::Dolt` and the result is non-empty for a known-seeded epic.

nodes.title: 2.5: Unit test claim_task against seeded issue
nodes.description: openspec/changes/epic-progress-dashboard/tasks.md §2.5. Unit test `claim_task` against a seeded issue: claim sets `assignee` and returns the updated `Task`.

nodes.title: 3.1: Regenerate src/bindings.ts with EpicReadySnapshot, BlockerLink, SnapshotSource, new commands
nodes.description: openspec/changes/epic-progress-dashboard/tasks.md §3.1. Run `bun tauri build` (or the existing specta codegen script) to regenerate `src/bindings.ts` with `EpicReadySnapshot`, `BlockerLink`, `SnapshotSource`, and the two new commands.

nodes.title: 3.2: Add getEpicReadySnapshot and claimTask wrappers in src/ipc.ts
nodes.description: openspec/changes/epic-progress-dashboard/tasks.md §3.2. Add `getEpicReadySnapshot(projectPath, epicId): Promise<EpicReadySnapshot>` and `claimTask(projectPath, taskId): Promise<Task>` wrappers in `src/ipc.ts`, matching the existing style.

nodes.title: 4.1: Add EpicTab to TabId union and epicTabId helper in paneTree.ts
nodes.description: openspec/changes/epic-progress-dashboard/tasks.md §4.1. In `src/utils/paneTree.ts`, add `EpicTab { kind: 'epic'; id: string; change: string; epicId: string }` to the `TabId` union and export an `epicTabId(change: string): string` helper returning `epic:${change}`.

nodes.title: 4.2: Add openEpicTab action to workspace.ts store
nodes.description: openspec/changes/epic-progress-dashboard/tasks.md §4.2. In `src/stores/workspace.ts`, add `openEpicTab(change: string, epicId: string)` action mirroring `openDocTab` (focus-if-open semantics, otherwise append + pin in active pane).

nodes.title: 4.3: Extend workspacePersist.ts rehydrator to round-trip epic tab variant
nodes.description: openspec/changes/epic-progress-dashboard/tasks.md §4.3. In `src/stores/workspacePersist.ts`, extend the rehydrator to round-trip the new `epic` variant. Drop unknown kinds rather than throwing.

nodes.title: 4.4: Dispatch epic tab in LeafPane.tsx, extend useTabTitles
nodes.description: openspec/changes/epic-progress-dashboard/tasks.md §4.4. In `src/components/workspace/LeafPane.tsx`, dispatch on `tab.kind === 'epic'` and render `<EpicDashboard change={tab.change} epicId={tab.epicId} />`. Extend `useTabTitles` to label epic tabs as `${change} · dashboard`.

nodes.title: 4.5: Update paneTree.test.ts to cover epic tab in findLeaf, replaceLeaf, nextTabAfterClose
nodes.description: openspec/changes/epic-progress-dashboard/tasks.md §4.5. Update `src/utils/paneTree.test.ts` to cover an `epic` tab in `findLeaf`, `replaceLeaf`, and `nextTabAfterClose`.

nodes.title: 4.6: Add serialiser round-trip test for epic tab variant in workspacePersist
nodes.description: openspec/changes/epic-progress-dashboard/tasks.md §4.6. Add a serialiser round-trip test in `src/stores/workspacePersist` (or its colocated test) for the `epic` variant.

nodes.title: 5.1: Create EpicDashboard.tsx with TanStack Query keyed on epicSnapshot
nodes.description: openspec/changes/epic-progress-dashboard/tasks.md §5.1. Create `src/components/epic-dashboard/EpicDashboard.tsx` exporting `EpicDashboard({ change, epicId })`. Use TanStack Query keyed `['epicSnapshot', project, epicId]` calling `getEpicReadySnapshot`. Invalidate on `allTasks` change and on manual refresh.

nodes.title: 5.2: Render EpicDashboard header row (epicId, counts, source, refresh icon)
nodes.description: openspec/changes/epic-progress-dashboard/tasks.md §5.2. Render the header row: `Epic: ${epicId}  •  ${ready} ready  •  ${inProgress} in progress  •  via ${source}` with a small caption for `source`. Right-aligned refresh icon.

nodes.title: 5.3: Render validation row with EpicValidationPill and ArtifactLink buttons
nodes.description: openspec/changes/epic-progress-dashboard/tasks.md §5.3. Render the validation row using a new `EpicValidationPill` component (see 5.5). To the right of the pill, render three `ArtifactLink`-style buttons that call `openDocTab(change, 'proposal.md' | 'design.md' | 'tasks.md')`.

nodes.title: 5.4: Render blocker chain with View full graph link
nodes.description: openspec/changes/epic-progress-dashboard/tasks.md §5.4. Render the blocker chain: `Currently blocked by: ${chain.join(' → ')}  View full graph →`. The 'View full graph' link calls `setState({ view: 'all', taskId: epicId, taskTab: 'deps' })`.

nodes.title: 5.5: Create EpicValidationPill.tsx (idle/running/pass/fail, age via relativeTime)
nodes.description: openspec/changes/epic-progress-dashboard/tasks.md §5.5. Create `src/components/epic-dashboard/EpicValidationPill.tsx` that wraps `runOpenspecValidate`, holds `idle | running | pass | fail` + `lastRunTs`, renders age via the existing `relativeTime` helper, and expands raw output on fail.

nodes.title: 5.6: Create EpicTaskRow.tsx (status pill, label chips, Claim button, Paused chip)
nodes.description: openspec/changes/epic-progress-dashboard/tasks.md §5.6. Create `src/components/epic-dashboard/EpicTaskRow.tsx` rendering one task: status pill, title, label chips reusing `LABEL_CHIP_COLORS`. When open+unclaimed render Claim button; when in `paused_task_ids` render amber 'Paused' chip linking to the bd issue.

nodes.title: 5.7: Group child issues into Ready/In progress/Blocked/Open/Closed sections in EpicDashboard
nodes.description: openspec/changes/epic-progress-dashboard/tasks.md §5.7. In `EpicDashboard.tsx`, group child issues (filtered from `allTasks` by `parent_children`) into `Ready`, `In progress`, `Blocked`, `Open (not ready)`, `Closed`. Render each group with a header showing the count; hide empty groups.

nodes.title: 5.8: Render empty state when epic has no children
nodes.description: openspec/changes/epic-progress-dashboard/tasks.md §5.8. Empty state: when `epicId` resolves but the epic has no children, render 'No tasks imported yet. Run `openspec-beads-import`.' with a copy-to-clipboard button.

nodes.title: 5.9: Render error state with Retry button when getEpicReadySnapshot rejects
nodes.description: openspec/changes/epic-progress-dashboard/tasks.md §5.9. Error state: when `getEpicReadySnapshot` rejects, render an inline error row with a 'Retry' button; the per-task list still renders from `allTasks`.

nodes.title: 6.1: Wrap ChangeCard body in clickable element calling openEpicTab
nodes.description: openspec/changes/epic-progress-dashboard/tasks.md §6.1. In `src/components/changes-browser/ChangeCard.tsx`, wrap the existing card body in a `<button>` (or `div role="button"`) whose `onClick` calls `openEpicTab(change.name, beadsProgress.epic_id)` only when `beadsProgress.epic_id` is non-null.

nodes.title: 6.2: Add cursor-pointer styling, aria-label, and disabled tooltip to ChangeCard
nodes.description: openspec/changes/epic-progress-dashboard/tasks.md §6.2. Add `cursor-pointer` styling and an `aria-label="Open ${change.name} dashboard"` only when click is enabled. When disabled, set a tooltip via the existing `<Tooltip>` wrapper: 'Import to Beads to enable dashboard'.

nodes.title: 6.3: Add e.stopPropagation() to all inner click handlers in ChangeCard
nodes.description: openspec/changes/epic-progress-dashboard/tasks.md §6.3. Add `e.stopPropagation()` to every existing inner click handler in the card: `ArtifactLink.handleClick`, the `imported → EPIC-ID` pill, the status pill (if interactive), and the dependency chips added by `changes-browser-dep-chips`.

nodes.title: 6.4: Add wrapper unit test in ChangesBrowser confirming inner click does not trigger dashboard open
nodes.description: openspec/changes/epic-progress-dashboard/tasks.md §6.4. In `src/components/changes-browser/ChangesBrowser.tsx`, add a wrapper unit test confirming a click on a stub `<ArtifactLink>` inside a `ChangeCard` does not trigger the open-dashboard handler.

nodes.title: 7.1: cargo test -p beadspec_lib commands::bd_mol passes
nodes.description: openspec/changes/epic-progress-dashboard/tasks.md §7.1. `cargo test -p beadspec_lib commands::bd_mol` passes.

nodes.title: 7.2: bun tsc --noEmit passes after bindings regeneration
nodes.description: openspec/changes/epic-progress-dashboard/tasks.md §7.2. `bun tsc --noEmit` passes after bindings regeneration.

nodes.title: 7.3: bun test epic-dashboard paneTree workspacePersist passes
nodes.description: openspec/changes/epic-progress-dashboard/tasks.md §7.3. `bun test src/components/epic-dashboard src/utils/paneTree.test.ts src/stores/workspacePersist` passes.

nodes.title: 7.4: Manual: ChangeCard click opens Epic Dashboard pane with via bd caption
nodes.description: openspec/changes/epic-progress-dashboard/tasks.md §7.4. Manual: `bun tauri dev`, click a `ChangeCard` whose change has an imported epic — Epic Dashboard pane opens in the active pane with `via bd` caption, ready count matches `bd ready --mol <epic> --json` output run from terminal.

nodes.title: 7.5: Manual: bd binary hidden → dashboard shows via dolt caption
nodes.description: openspec/changes/epic-progress-dashboard/tasks.md §7.5. Manual: rename or PATH-hide the `bd` binary, refresh dashboard — pane re-renders with `via dolt` caption and identical ready set.

nodes.title: 7.6: Manual: paused task shows amber Paused chip
nodes.description: openspec/changes/epic-progress-dashboard/tasks.md §7.6. Manual: pause a child task via `openspec-beads-scope-change`; refresh dashboard — that task shows the amber 'Paused' chip linking to the scope-change child issue.

nodes.title: 7.7: Manual: Claim button runs bd update --claim and task moves to In progress
nodes.description: openspec/changes/epic-progress-dashboard/tasks.md §7.7. Manual: click a ready task's 'Claim' button — `bd update <id> --claim` runs, the task moves to 'In progress' within one `allTasks` tick, no console errors.

nodes.title: 7.8: Manual: workspace persistence restores dashboard tab after reload
nodes.description: openspec/changes/epic-progress-dashboard/tasks.md §7.8. Manual: split the pane horizontally, drag the dashboard tab into the new leaf, reload the app — workspace persistence restores the dashboard tab in the same leaf.

nodes.title: 7.9: Manual: validation pill runs openspec validate and shows pass/fail age
nodes.description: openspec/changes/epic-progress-dashboard/tasks.md §7.9. Manual: click the validation pill — runs `openspec validate <change-slug>`, shows pass/fail and the last-run age.

nodes.title: 7.10: openspec validate epic-progress-dashboard passes
nodes.description: openspec/changes/epic-progress-dashboard/tasks.md §7.10. `openspec validate epic-progress-dashboard` passes.
